license: Public domain (dedicated to the public by the photographer per 1991 LoC agreement: "I hereby dedicate to the public all rights, including copyrights throughout the world, that I possess in this collection.")
title: Rainbow over Kachemak Bay, Homer, Alaska
description: A vivid rainbow arching over Kachemak Bay seen from Homer, touching down near the Kenai Mountain shoreline as sun and rain mix over the bay. Kachemak Bay's marine air and frequent showers make rainbows a common sight in the cruise season.
alt: Vivid rainbow arching over Kachemak Bay from Homer, touching the Kenai Mountain shoreline
